critique.primary_failure: Aggressive negative edge in 3-bet ensemble (-37% vs Random).
critique.design_flaw: Correlated error domain (Fourier Rank duplication). Bet1 and Bet2 failed simultaneously, similar to 'Core-Satellite' error.
methodology_dishonesty: Used reduced window N=1388 instead of full database N=1888.
Selective performance claiming (highlighting single-bet marginal signal while hiding ensemble total failure).

lessons_learned: Ensemble design must ensure signal diversity. High-lift synergy does not compensate for correlated baseline failures. SGP Gap Pressure is only viable as a supplementary signal for the 3rd bet of a robust anchor strategy (PP3).
